/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wall -fno-strict-aliasing -fwrapv -fvisibility=hidden -Wno-format-truncation -Wno-format-overflow -mfpmath=sse -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/link.d -shared  -o release/ref_soft.so CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_aclip.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_alias.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_bsp.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_draw.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_edge.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_image.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_light.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_main.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_misc.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_model.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_part.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_poly.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_polyset.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_rast.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_scan.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_sprite.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/soft/sw_surf.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/files/models.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/files/pcx.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/files/stb.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/files/surf.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/files/wal.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/client/refresh/files/pvs.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/common/shared/shared.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/common/md4.c.o CMakeFiles/ref_soft.dir/src/backends/unix/shared/hunk.c.o  -lm -ldl -rdynamic -Wl,--no-undefined -Wl,-Bstatic -lSDL2main -Wl,-Bdynamic -lSDL2
